benefits.description: Lost 12 kg over 2.5 months (85 kg to 73 kg). Appetite control feels unreal with sustainable fat loss instead of constant mental battle against hunger and food noise.
Retatrutide has been the biggest factor for appetite regulation and food noise. Eating feels calm and controlled instead of impulsive.
Tesamorelin noticeably improved fat distribution and recovery, especially around stubborn areas.
Sleep quality feels deeper and more consistent with Tesamorelin.
GHK-Cu has had positive effect on skin quality. Skin feels smoother and a bit thicker/healthier. Minor irritation or small blemishes seem to heal faster.
GHK-Cu has had a positive effect on overall recovery feel, especially with minor aches and connective tissue stress.

MT2 has noticeably increased libido. More spontaneous drive and a higher baseline overall. Before the stack, libido was flat with low drive and low spontaneous interest, especially during cuts or longer deficits.

side_effects.description: MT2 caused darkening and slightly enlarged moles early on. Visible difference when comparing pictures from before and after.

protocol_notes: Retatrutide titration schedule: Weeks 1-2: 1 mg/week; Weeks 3-4: 2 mg/week; Weeks 5-8: 4 mg/week; Weeks 9-12: 6 mg/week. User reports finding compounds on grey market. Goal is fat loss phase before transitioning to clean bulk. Not focused on maximizing muscle currently.
